rec_texts: Following Items Are Already Included In Our Scope Of Supply In Digital & UV Printers :
Following Items Are Already Included In Our Scope Of Supply In ITM/BCS850 :
1. Pneumatic Auto fabric roll lifting System,
2. Print Mark Sensor For Pre-Printed Fabric Rolls,
3. Straight Heat Cutter For Unlaminated Fabric(Max. upto34" (Width) x 56"(Length))
4. Servo based Cold Cutter For Laminated Fabric(Max. upto32"(Width) x 56"(Length))
6. Stitching Machine Model Indian Make AS 502 HD-SP-BCS
8. Auto Thread Break Sensor for Stitching Machine.
9. PLC& Servo based Automatic Machine Control System with 7" HMI (Touch Screen Control)
NOTE: PLEASE CONSIDER WITH THESE ITEMS ONLY
